title.no-sidewalk: Should there be a No Footpath label here?

curb-ramp.no-button-2: This is a footpath to driveway transition
curb-ramp.no-button-tooltip-2: Footpath to driveway transitions are not drop kerbs unless a dedicated ramp has been added
curb-ramp.no-button-3: This should be a Missing Drop Kerb label
curb-ramp.no-button-3-tooltip: Sometimes a missing drop kerb is accidentally mislabeled as a drop kerb

no-curb-ramp.no-button-3: This should be a Drop Kerb label
no-curb-ramp.no-button-3-tooltip: Sometimes a drop kerb is mislabeled as a missing ramp, often because it's missing a tactile warning

obstacle.no-button-1-tooltip: If there is no footpath or the object is not on the part of the footpath meant for pedestrians, like in the image below, an Obstacle label is not needed
obstacle.no-button-2-tooltip: On very wide footpaths, easily avoidable objects should not be labeled as obstacles

surface-problem.no-button-1: This should be a No Footpath label
surface-problem.no-button-1-tooltip: Gravel or grass are not considered a footpath, and should be marked with a No Footpath label

no-sidewalk.no-button-3-tooltip: Surface problems or obstacles may be mistakenly labeled as No Footpath

crosswalk.no-button-1: There is no visible pedestrian crossing here

no-curb-ramp.unsure-button-3: Not sure if a drop kerb is required

obstacle.unsure-button-3-tooltip: The width of the footpath may be difficult to judge from a picture

surface-problem.unsure-button-3-tooltip: It may be unclear whether an issue like grass between footpath blocks needs to be labeled

no-sidewalk.unsure-button-3: Not sure if there should be a footpath here
no-sidewalk.unsure-button-3-tooltip: Sometimes more context is necessary, and it's hard to determine if a footpath is necessary from just one image

mission-complete.body-1: You just validated {{n}} Drop Kerb labels.
mission-complete.body-2: You just validated {{n}} Missing Drop Kerb labels.
mission-complete.body-7: You just validated {{n}} No Footpath labels.
mission-complete.body-9: You just validated {{n}} Marked Pedestrian Crossing labels.
